tldr_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-5解決免疫學難題，AI供應鏈安全成全球焦點，量子密碼學競賽升溫。
tldr_en: OpenAI's GPT-5 solves immunology mystery, AI supply chain security becomes global focus, quantum cryptography race heats up.

items.title_zh: GPT-5助力免疫學家破解3年謎團，癌症研究迎新突破
items.title_en: GPT-5 Helps Immunologist Solve 3-Year Mystery, Breakthrough in Cancer Research
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出的GPT-5 Pro幫助免疫學家Derya Unutmaz解開困擾3年的T細胞行為謎團，這項突破可能對癌症和自身免疫疾病研究產生重大影響。該案例展示了先進AI模型在科學研究中的實際應用價值。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's GPT-5 Pro helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year mystery about T cell behavior, potentially advancing cancer and autoimmune disease research. This breakthrough demonstrates the practical value of advanced AI models in scientific research.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推動全球AI安全標準建設，支持評估框架與行業合作
items.title_en: OpenAI Drives Global AI Safety Standards, Supports Evaluation Frameworks
items.summary_zh: OpenAI與Appia基金會合作，推進建立共享的AI安全標準，涵蓋評估框架、安全實踐和全球合作機制。這項舉措體現了業界對AI透明度和安全性的承諾，促進全球AI治理協調。
items.summary_en: OpenAI collaborates with the Appia Foundation to establish shared AI safety standards, including evaluation frameworks and safety practices. This initiative demonstrates industry commitment to AI transparency and safety governance.

items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude Tag進駐Slack，AI學習企業知識與工作流程
items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Tag Launches in Slack, Learning Company Knowledge
items.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Tag功能於Slack中，作為可在背景持續運作的AI隊友。該功能不僅提升生產力，更重要的是能捕捉組織背景、制度知識和企業工作流程，成為Anthropic深化企業市場的戰略佈局。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack as an always-on AI teammate. Beyond productivity gains, it strategically captures organizational context and institutional knowledge, strengthening Anthropic's enterprise market position.

items.title_zh: GitHub Copilot支援Claude代理，JetBrains IDE開發體驗升級
items.title_en: GitHub Copilot Adds Claude Agent Support for JetBrains IDEs
items.summary_zh: GitHub更新Copilot for JetBrains IDEs，新增Claude作為代理提供者，並改善Copilot CLI長時間任務的互動控制。組織可在GitHub端發布代理設定供開發者在IDE內選用，管理範圍更明確。
items.summary_en: GitHub updates Copilot for JetBrains IDEs with Claude as an agent provider option. Organizations can publish agent configurations centrally, allowing developers to select them within IDEs with improved management clarity.

items.title_zh: 美國提前量子密碼學過渡期限，國家安全警報敲響
items.title_en: White House Drastically Shortens Deadline for Quantum-Safe Cryptography
items.summary_zh: 白宮行政命令大幅縮短企業從量子易受攻擊加密技術遷移至後量子密碼學的期限，稱延遲構成國家安全風險。這反映出量子計算能力進展對網路安全的緊迫威脅。
items.summary_en: The White House executive order significantly shortens the deadline for organizations to transition from quantum-vulnerable cryptography to post-quantum standards, citing national security risks. This reflects the urgent threat quantum computing poses to cybersecurity.

items.title_zh: Oracle耗資數十億美元投資AI數據中心，裁員21000人支應成本
items.title_en: Oracle's $21,000 Layoffs Fund Multi-Billion Dollar AI Infrastructure Investment
items.summary_zh: Oracle透過大規模裁員(21000人)籌措資金，投入數十億美元建設數據中心以支撐AI業務發展。這反映出大科技公司為搶占生成式AI市場而進行的激進財務佈局。
items.summary_en: Oracle uses 21,000 layoffs to fund multi-billion dollar data center investments for AI. This reflects aggressive financial restructuring by major tech companies competing in the generative AI market.

items.title_zh: 台灣AI政策升級國家戰略層級，主權AI與資料治理成核心
items.title_en: Taiwan Elevates AI to National Strategy Level, Establishes Sovereign AI Framework
items.summary_zh: 行政院依AI基本法設立「國家人工智慧戰略特別委員會」，由院長卓榮泰擔任召集人，象徵台灣AI發展從分散政策升格為國家級統籌治理。主權AI與資料治理制度化成為新核心目標。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's Executive Yuan establishes the 'National AI Strategy Special Committee' with Premier Cho Jung-tai as chair, elevating AI from dispersed policies to national-level governance. Sovereign AI and data governance become central strategic priorities.

items.title_zh: AWS Amazon Quick新增自主代理，跨企業資料查詢能力升級
items.title_en: AWS Enhances Amazon Quick with Autonomous Agents and Cross-Enterprise Queries
items.summary_zh: AWS升級AI助理Amazon Quick，新增可在背景持續執行工作的自主代理、強化活動摘要，與跨企業資料來源查詢。用戶可透過自然語言要求Quick整理資料、產出文件或協助例行工作。
items.summary_en: AWS upgrades AI assistant Amazon Quick with autonomous agents that work in the background, enhanced activity summaries, and cross-enterprise data source queries, enabling natural language task automation for knowledge workers.

items.title_zh: 荷蘭加入美國「矽盛世」倡議，全球AI供應鏈安全聯盟擴大
items.title_en: Netherlands Joins U.S. 'Pax Silica' AI Supply Chain Security Initiative
items.summary_zh: 荷蘭宣布加入美國主導的「矽盛世」倡議，該聯盟旨在確保AI供應鏈安全。包括澳洲、日本、韓國、新加坡、英國等盟國已簽署，台灣也將以非簽署方身分參與本週峰會。
items.summary_en: The Netherlands joins the U.S.-led 'Pax Silica' initiative with allies including Australia, Japan, South Korea, and Singapore to secure AI supply chains. Taiwan will participate as a non-signatory at this week's summit in Washington.

items.title_zh: 歐洲熱浪創紀錄，法國經歷1947年來最高溫，艾菲爾鐵塔提早關閉
items.title_en: Europe's Deadly Heatwave Sets Records, France Experiences Hottest Day Since 1947
items.summary_zh: 法國遭致命熱浪侵襲，創1947年開始記錄以來最高溫，全國氣溫指標達攝氏29.8度。巴黎預估傍晚溫度達40度，艾菲爾鐵塔被迫提早關閉。自上週四起，法國已有40人因熱浪喪生。
items.summary_en: France experiences its hottest day since 1947 amid a deadly European heatwave, with national temperature indicators reaching 29.8°C. Paris temperatures expected to hit 40°C, forcing early closure of the Eiffel Tower. At least 40 deaths reported in France since last Thursday.

items.title_zh: 美伊達成協議，聯合國將撤離波灣滯留船員，荷莫茲海峽局勢緩和
items.title_en: U.S.-Iran Deal Brings Relief, UN to Evacuate 11,000+ Stranded Sailors from Persian Gulf
items.summary_zh: 美國與伊朗達成結束中東戰爭協議後，國際海事組織宣布將開始撤離滯留於波斯灣超過11000名船員。此舉標誌著荷莫茲海峽局勢的重要轉折，但伊朗與阿曼仍研議對該海峽徵收管理服務費，美方明確反對。
items.summary_en: Following the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement, the International Maritime Organization begins evacuating 11,000+ sailors stranded in the Persian Gulf. While easing tensions, Iran and Oman are discussing management fees for the Strait of Hormuz, which the U.S. opposes on international waters grounds.
